specification.function: Implements the stop-and-wait Alternating Bit Protocol (ABP) sender. Maintains sender state: next seq_num (starts at 1), current control bit (starts at 0), and whether there is an outstanding packet awaiting a valid ACK. States and Output at the end of the state: IDLE: No outstanding packet and not preparing; if there are remaining packets, it immediately starts PREPARE. PREPARE: Sender is in deterministic preparation delay (sender_delay). When PREPARE ends, it outputs out_data. WAIT_ACK: Sender is waiting for a valid ACK or timeout. When WAIT_ACK ends (timeout), it transitions to PREPARE for a retransmission (no output at the end of WAIT_ACK). DONE: Sender has completed sending total_packets; no further outputs.
specification.logging: [{"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "time (float): Absolute simulation time in ms. entity (str): Always \"sender\". event (str): Always \"delay_start\". payload (dict): type (str): Always \"preparation\". duration (float): Preparation duration in ms (equals sender_delay).", "description": "delay_start"}, {"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "time (float): Absolute simulation time in ms. entity (str): Always \"sender\". event (str): Always \"packet_sent\". payload (dict): seq_num (int): Sequence number of the data packet (>=1). bit (int): Control bit (0 or 1). is_retry (bool): True if this send is a retransmission of the outstanding packet.", "description": "packet_sent"}, {"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "time (float): Absolute simulation time in ms. entity (str): Always \"sender\". event (str): Always \"ack_received\". payload (dict): ack_bit (int): ACK bit received (0 or 1). is_valid (bool): True iff ack_bit matches the outstanding packet's bit at receipt time.", "description": "ack_received"}]

model_init_args.name: name
model_init_args.structure: The unique name of the model.

model_init_args.name: parent
model_init_args.structure: the parent model. If None, the model is a root model.

model_init_args.name: total_packets
model_init_args.structure: Total number of data packets to deliver reliably; Sender sends seq_num 1..total_packets then stops.

model_init_args.name: timeout
model_init_args.structure: Sender timeout duration in ms (time units). Default 20.

model_init_args.name: sender_delay
model_init_args.structure: Sender preparation delay in ms (time units) before each send attempt. Default 10.

protocol.description: initialize: uses model_init_args.total_packets unless a t=0 injection arrives ; process: if received, overrides total_packets.
initialize: no ACK expected until after first send ; process: log every ACK and validate against outstanding bit.

output_ports.name: out_data
output_ports.structure: seq_num (int): Sequence number in [1..total_packets]. bit (int): Control bit in {0,1}.

protocol.description: initialize: no initial output ; process: output after preparation delay completes.

specification.function: Implements the Alternating Bit Protocol (ABP) receiver behavior with a capacity-1 buffer and deterministic processing delay. States and Output at the end of the state: IDLE: Buffer is empty and receiver is ready to accept a new data packet. No output at end of state. BUSY: Receiver is processing the buffered packet for receiver_delay time units. When BUSY ends, the receiver logs packet_received for the buffered packet, outputs an ACK packet on out_ack with the same bit as the buffered packet, and clears the buffer and returns to IDLE
specification.logging: [{"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "{\"time\": float, \"entity\": \"receiver\", \"event\": \"delay_start\", \"payload\": {\"type\": \"processing\", \"duration\": float}}", "description": "Receiver delay_start - logs when a packet processing delay starts. time (float): Absolute simulation time in ms. entity (str): Always \"receiver\". event (str): Always \"delay_start\". payload (dict): Event payload. type (str): Always \"processing\". duration (float): Processing duration in ms (equals receiver_delay)."}, {"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "{\"time\": float, \"entity\": \"receiver\", \"event\": \"packet_received\", \"payload\": {\"seq_num\": int, \"bit\": int}}", "description": "Receiver packet_received - logs when a packet is received at the end of processing. time (float): Absolute simulation time in ms. entity (str): Always \"receiver\". event (str): Always \"packet_received\". payload (dict): Event payload. seq_num (int): Sequence number of the received data packet. bit (int): Control bit of the received data packet (0 or 1)."}]

model_init_args.name: name
model_init_args.structure: The unique name of the model

model_init_args.name: parent
model_init_args.structure: the parent model. If None, the model is a root model.

model_init_args.name: receiver_delay
model_init_args.structure: Receiver processing delay in ms (time units) for each accepted packet. Default 10.0.

input_ports.name: in_data
input_ports.structure: seq_num (int): Sequence number (1, 2, ...). bit (int): Control bit (0 or 1).

protocol.initial_state: Idle with empty buffer at t=0
protocol.description: initialize: Idle with empty buffer at t=0 ; process: if IDLE, buffer first arriving packet and start deterministic processing delay; if BUSY, ignore additional arriving packets.

output_ports.name: out_ack
output_ports.structure: ack_bit (int): Acknowledgment bit (0 or 1), equals the buffered packet's bit.

protocol.description: initialize: no pending output at t=0 ; process: emit ACK immediately when processing completes.

specification.function: Implements a unidirectional subnet/channel with deterministic loss and fixed latency. Maintains an internal deterministic noise state x, initialized from seed at t=0 and updated per arrival: x_new = (17 * x_old + 11) mod 100. On each packet arrival, fate is determined immediately (same simulation time): If x_new < 10, drop (no delivery scheduled); else, pass and schedule delivery exactly channel_delay time units later. States and Output at the end of the state: IDLE: No pending delivery. No output. DELIVER: A passed packet is pending delivery; when DELIVER ends, output the prepared packet on out_deliver.
specification.logging: [{"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "{\"time\": float, \"entity\": \"subnet\", \"event\": \"model_created\", \"payload\": {\"seed\": int, \"channel_delay\": float, \"channel\": \"forward\" or \"backward\"}}", "description": "event: Model Created"}, {"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "{\"time\": float, \"entity\": \"subnet\", \"event\": \"model_initialized\", \"payload\": {\"noise_state\": int, \"channel\": \"forward\" or \"backward\"}}", "description": "event: Model Initialized"}, {"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "{\"time\": float, \"entity\": \"subnet\", \"event\": \"packet_get\", \"payload\": {\"behavior\": \"drop\" or \"pass\", \"channel\": \"forward\" or \"backward\", \"noise_value\": int}}", "description": "event: packet_get (Subnet-required event; fate determined immediately on arrival)"}, {"log_type": "RESULT", "msg": "{\"time\": float, \"entity\": \"subnet\", \"event\": \"model_finalized\", \"payload\": {\"channel\": \"forward\" or \"backward\", \"total_arrivals\": int, \"total_passed\": int, \"total_dropped\": int}}", "description": "event: Model Finalized"}]

model_init_args.name: name
model_init_args.structure: The unique name of the model.

model_init_args.name: parent
model_init_args.structure: the parent model. If None, the model is a root model.

model_init_args.name: seed
model_init_args.structure: Initial noise state x for this subnet instance at t=0.

model_init_args.name: channel_delay
model_init_args.structure: Subnet transmission latency in ms (time units) for passed packets.

model_init_args.name: channel_label
model_init_args.structure: Channel label used in logs: must be exactly 'forward' or 'backward'.

input_ports.name: in_packet
input_ports.structure: seq_num (int): Data packet sequence number (present for data packets only). bit (int): Data packet alternating bit, 0 or 1 (present for data packets only). ack_bit (int): ACK alternating bit, 0 or 1 (present for ACK packets only).

protocol.initial_state: Noise state x initialized from seed; no queued deliveries at t=0.
protocol.description: initialize: Noise state x initialized from seed; no queued deliveries at t=0. ; process: On each arrival, immediately compute noise, log packet_get, and either drop or schedule delivery after channel_delay.

output_ports.name: out_deliver
output_ports.structure: seq_num (int): Data packet sequence number (present for data packets only). bit (int): Data packet alternating bit, 0 or 1 (present for data packets only). ack_bit (int): ACK alternating bit, 0 or 1 (present for ACK packets only).

protocol.description: initialize: No pending delivery at t=0. ; process: Emits exactly channel_delay after arrival when behavior='pass'.

specification.function: Implements an Alternating Bit Protocol (ABP) communication system as a coupled DEVS model. Composes Sender, Receiver, and two deterministic-loss channels (forward/backward) with fixed latency.
specification.logging: [{"log_type": "PROCESS", "msg": "time (float): Absolute simulation time in ms (from get_current_time()). entity (str): Always \"system\". event (str): Always \"model_created\". payload (dict): Model configuration. total_packets (int): Total number of packets to send. seed (int): Initial noise seed for both subnets (each subnet has its own internal state initialized to this seed). timeout (float): Sender timeout in ms. sender_delay (float): Sender preparation delay in ms. receiver_delay (float): Receiver processing delay in ms. channel_delay (float): Channel latency in ms.", "description": "event: model_created"}]

model_init_args.name: total_packets
model_init_args.structure: Total number of data packets to deliver reliably; Sender sends seq_num 1..total_packets then stops.

model_init_args.name: seed
model_init_args.structure: Initial noise state x for BOTH subnets (each subnet gets its own x initialized to this value).

model_init_args.name: timeout
model_init_args.structure: Sender timeout duration in ms (time units). Default 20.

model_init_args.name: receiver_delay
model_init_args.structure: Receiver processing delay in ms (time units) for each accepted packet. Default 10.

model_init_args.name: channel_delay
model_init_args.structure: Subnet transmission latency in ms (time units) for passed packets. Default 3.

protocol.description: initialize: if injected at t=0, overrides sender's total_packets ; process: ignored/handled by sender logic.

input_ports.name: in_from_sender
input_ports.structure: seq_num (int): Sequence number (>=1). bit (int): Alternating control bit (0 or 1).

protocol.description: initialize: no initial signal ; process: forwarded to subnet1_forward.in_packet.
initialize: no initial signal ; process: forwarded to subnet2_backward.in_packet.

input_ports.name: in_to_receiver
input_ports.structure: seq_num (int): Sequence number (>=1). bit (int): Alternating control bit (0 or 1).

protocol.description: initialize: no initial signal ; process: forwarded to receiver.in_data.
initialize: no initial signal ; process: forwarded to sender.in_ack.

output_ports.name: out_to_subnet1
output_ports.structure: seq_num (int): Sequence number (>=1). bit (int): Alternating control bit (0 or 1).

protocol.description: initialize: no output ; process: emitted when sender completes preparation delay.
initialize: no output ; process: emitted when receiver completes processing delay.

output_ports.name: out_from_subnet1
output_ports.structure: seq_num (int): Sequence number (>=1). bit (int): Alternating control bit (0 or 1).

protocol.description: initialize: no output ; process: emitted by subnet1_forward when delivery time occurs.
initialize: no output ; process: emitted by subnet2_backward when delivery time occurs.
